Mar 05, 2003 vim --- "vim" is an enhanced version of the standard UNIX "vi" editor. It is especially useful for editing programs. It is installed on the Instructional UNIX systems in /usr/sww/bin/vim. There is a manual page in /usr/sww/man.

n/vim. There is a manual page in /usr/sww/man. You can add this to your "man" search path with the UNIX command: setenv MANPATH /usr/sww/man:$MANPATH There is other documentation in /usr/sww/pkg/vim/share/vim. Questions to "inst@eec
r/sww/pkg/vim/share/vim. Questions to "inst@eecs.berkeley.edu" please. Instructional Support Group 378/386/384 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
